name: APEX
description: Autonomous code coverage analysis and security detection for 11 languages. 33 MCP tools: coverage gaps, CWE-mapped findings, reverse path reachability, blast radius, deployment confidence scoring, and more.

tools.name: apex_run
tools.description: Run coverage analysis. Returns branch coverage data, uncovered branches, and suggested test targets.

tools.name: apex_detect
tools.description: Run security/bug detection. Returns findings with CWE IDs, severity, and remediation advice.

tools.name: apex_reach
tools.description: Map reachable code paths from a source location (file:line). Entry-point reachability and attack surface.

tools.name: apex_ratchet
tools.description: CI coverage gate. Fails if branch coverage drops below threshold.

tools.name: apex_doctor
tools.description: Verify all required external tools are installed and configured.

tools.name: apex_deploy_score
tools.description: Deployment confidence score (0-100) based on coverage, findings, and quality.

tools.name: apex_complexity
tools.description: Analyze function-level cyclomatic complexity. Hotspots sorted by score.

tools.name: apex_dead_code
tools.description: Find unreachable branches and dead code.

tools.name: apex_risk
tools.description: Assess risk of changed files. Affected test count and risk level.

tools.name: apex_hotpaths
tools.description: Identify most frequently executed code paths.

tools.name: apex_test_optimize
tools.description: Identify redundant tests that can be removed to save CI time.

tools.name: apex_test_prioritize
tools.description: Prioritize tests by relevance to changed files.

tools.name: apex_blast_radius
tools.description: Calculate blast radius of changed files — affected modules and tests.

tools.name: apex_secret_scan
tools.description: Scan for hardcoded secrets, API keys, and high-entropy strings.

tools.name: apex_data_flow
tools.description: Trace data flow and taint paths through the codebase.

tools.name: apex_diff
tools.description: Analyze coverage diff between two commits or branches.

tools.name: apex_regression_check
tools.description: Check for coverage regressions against the stored baseline.

tools.name: apex_lint
tools.description: Run code quality lints including complexity, naming, and style checks.

tools.name: apex_flaky_detect
tools.description: Detect flaky tests by analyzing test history and execution patterns.

tools.name: apex_contracts
tools.description: Extract function contracts (pre/post conditions) from source code.

tools.name: apex_attack_surface
tools.description: Map attack surface — entry points, trust boundaries, and exposed APIs.

tools.name: apex_verify_boundaries
tools.description: Verify trust boundary enforcement between modules.

tools.name: apex_features
tools.description: List features and their test coverage status.

tools.name: apex_index
tools.description: Build the branch coverage index for a target project.

tools.name: apex_docs
tools.description: Generate documentation coverage report.

tools.name: apex_license_scan
tools.description: Scan dependencies for license compliance issues.

tools.name: apex_flag_hygiene
tools.description: Detect stale or unused feature flags in source code.

tools.name: apex_api_diff
tools.description: Compare two OpenAPI specs for breaking changes.

tools.name: apex_compliance_export
tools.description: Export compliance report (ASVS, STRIDE, SSDF) for audit.

tools.name: apex_api_coverage
tools.description: Measure API endpoint test coverage against an OpenAPI spec.

tools.name: apex_service_map
tools.description: Build a service dependency map from imports and API calls.

tools.name: apex_schema_check
tools.description: Validate data schemas against actual usage patterns.

tools.name: apex_test_data
tools.description: Generate test data based on schema analysis.
